sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ المَنْهَجُ الإِسْلَامِيُّ فِي المُعَامَلَاتِ المَالِيَّةِ عَلَى قَوَاعِدَ مَتِينَةٍ مِنَ الصِّدْقِ وَالأَمَانَةِ، حَيْثُ يُعَدُّ النُّصْحُ لِلمُسْلِمِ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنَ الدِّينِ.
sentences.translation: Islamski pristup finansijskim transakcijama zasnovan je na čvrstim pravilima istinoljubivosti i povjerenja, pri čemu se savjetovanje muslimana smatra neodvojivim dijelom vjere.
sentences.translationEn: The Islamic approach to financial transactions is based on solid foundations of honesty and integrity, where sincere advice to a fellow Muslim is considered an integral part of religion.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ بَيَّنَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ أَنَّ البَيِّعَيْنِ بِالخِيَارِ مَا لَمْ يَتَفَرَّقَا، فَإِنْ صَدَقَا وَبَيَّنَا بُورِكَ لَهُمَا فِي بَيْعِهِمَا، وَإِنْ كَتَمَا وَكَذَبَا مُحِقَتْ بَرَكَةُ بَيْعِهِمَا [أَخْرَجَهُ البُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ البُيُوعِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, objasnio je da kupac i prodavac imaju pravo na izbor sve dok se ne raziđu; ako budu iskreni i objasne nedostatke, bit će im dat beriket u njihovoj trgovini, a ako budu prešutjeli i lagali, beriket njihove trgovine bit će uništen [Buhari, Knjiga o kupoprodaji].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) explained that the two parties in a transaction have the option to cancel as long as they have not separated; if they are honest and clarify any defects, they will be blessed in their sale, but if they conceal and lie, the blessing of their sale will be obliterated [Bukhari, Book of Sales].

sentences.arabic: وَفِي هَذَا السِّيَاقِ، يُؤَكِّدُ شَيْخُ الإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ أَنَّ العَدْلَ فِي المُعَامَلَاتِ هُوَ قِوَامُ العَالَمِ، وَأَنَّ الظُّلْمَ وَالغِشَّ يُؤَدِّيَانِ إِلَى مَحْقِ الخَيْرَاتِ وَانْتِشَارِ الفَسَادِ.
sentences.translation: U tom kontekstu, šejhul-islam Ibn Tejmijje naglašava da je pravda u poslovanju stub svijeta, te da nepravda i prevara vode ka nestanku dobra i širenju nereda.
sentences.translationEn: In this context, Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah emphasizes that justice in transactions is the mainstay of the world, and that injustice and fraud lead to the erosion of blessings and the spread of corruption.

sentences.arabic: فَلَا يَجُوزُ لِلمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَخْدَعَ أَخَاهُ بِإِخْفَاءِ عَيْبٍ فِي السِّلْعَةِ أَوْ بِالتَّلَاعُبِ فِي الأَسْعَارِ، بَلْ يَجِبُ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يَكُونَ شَفَّافًا وَاضِحًا.
sentences.translation: Muslimanu nije dozvoljeno da vara svog brata skrivajući mahane robe ili manipulišući cijenama, već mora biti transparentan i jasan.
sentences.translationEn: It is not permissible for a Muslim to deceive his brother by hiding a defect in the goods or by manipulating prices; rather, he must be transparent and clear.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ البَرَكَةَ الإِلَهِيَّةَ مَرْهُونَةٌ بِتَقْوَى اللهِ فِي الكَسْبِ، فَالمَالُ الحَلَالُ وَإِنْ قَلَّ، فَهُوَ أَنْفَعُ لِلصَّاحِبِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالآخِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Božanski beriket zavisi od bogobojaznosti u sticanju zarade; halal imetak, makar ga bilo i malo, korisniji je vlasniku i na dunjaluku i na ahiretu.
sentences.translationEn: Divine blessing is contingent upon the fear of Allah in earning; lawful wealth, even if small, is more beneficial to the owner in this world and the hereafter.

sentences.arabic: وَمَنْ آثَرَ العَاجِلَةَ عَلَى الآجِلَةِ فَسَلَكَ طُرُقَ المَكْرِ وَالخَدِيعَةِ، فَقَدْ عَرَّضَ نَفْسَهُ لِلخُسْرَانِ المُبِينِ.
sentences.translation: Ko pretpostavi prolazni svijet vječnom, pa krene putevima spletki i obmana, izložio je sebe jasnom gubitku.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever prefers the immediate life over the hereafter and follows the paths of cunning and deception has exposed himself to manifest loss.

sentences.arabic: وَلِذَا، كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ رِضْوَانُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ يَتَحَرَّوْنَ الدِّقَّةَ فِي تِجَارَتِهِمْ، خَوْفًا مِنْ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ جَوْفَهُمْ حَرَامٌ.
sentences.translation: Zato su ashabi, radijallahu anhum, bili veoma precizni u svojoj trgovini, bojeći se da u njihovu nutrinu uđe išta haram.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the Companions (may Allah be pleased with them) used to be extremely meticulous in their trade, fearing that anything forbidden might enter their bodies.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الالتِزَامَ بِهَذِهِ القِيَمِ الأَخْلَاقِيَّةِ يُعِيدُ لِلأُمَّةِ تَمَاسُكَهَا وَيَبْنِي جُسُورَ الثِّقَةِ بَيْنَ أَفْرَادِ المُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Pridržavanje ovih moralnih vrijednosti vraća ummetu njegovu koheziju i gradi mostove povjerenja među članovima društva.
sentences.translationEn: Commitment to these ethical values restores the Ummah's cohesion and builds bridges of trust among members of society.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الخِتَامِ، يَبْقَى الصِّدْقُ هُوَ السَّبِيلَ الوَحِيدَ لِنَيْلِ مَحَبَّةِ اللهِ وَرِضْوَانِهِ فِي كُلِّ شَأْنٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, istinoljubivost ostaje jedini put ka sticanju Allahove ljubavi i zadovoljstva u svakoj stvari.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, honesty remains the only way to gain Allah's love and pleasure in every matter.
